ocr_findings.description: Page number '518' (printed at bottom of image) appears at end of OCR text body as '518' on its own line, suggesting it was picked up as body text rather than ignored as a margin artifact. Cosmetic only.

reviewer_notes: Lesson 15-05 page on デジタル署名と認証局. Has large chapter heading but also substantial body text (4+ paragraphs explaining digital signatures and the key-swap principle), so 'content' is correct over 'chapter_title'. All prose faithfully captured including the デジタル署名の大原則 callout box. Illustration is referenced as img-0.jpeg.
